title: Curaleaf Reports $1.34 Billion in 2024 Revenue
text: Curaleaf Holdings maintained a stable revenue of $1.34 billion in 2024 despite a 14% industry-wide price compression. The company achieved full-year adjusted gross margin of 48%, an increase of 160 basis points compared to 2023. Curaleaf achieved a 73% growth in its International segment, surpassing the $100 million revenue milestone. The company reduced its acquisition-related debt by $60 million, strengthening its balance sheet. During 2024, Curaleaf faced significant challenges in specific markets with notable price compression in key markets like Pennsylvania, Illinois, and New Jersey. The company reported a net loss from continuing operations of $72 million in the fourth quarter. Full-year 2025 adjusted gross margin is expected to be approximately 50%, with continued focus on organic growth and margin optimization.
